Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3115: Bhogilal Enters Jethalal's Life Once Again
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder plays the call recording of the land deal to everyone present in the Gada household. While hearing this, Jethalal, Taarak, Sodhi and Bhide find out that the voice of the buyer is somewhat familiar. After investigating a little, they find out that it is indeed Bhogilal who has come into Jethalal's life once again, albeit as a buyer. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: ₹14,69,979 Smartphone Shopping For You🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:

snippet.title: WB Election 2021: 'দীর্ঘদিন একসঙ্গে থাকার দাম দিল', টিকিট না পেয়ে কান্না ভেঙে পড়লেন সোনালি গুহ
snippet.description:
সাতগাছিয়ায় টিকিট না পেয়ে কান্নায় ভেঙে পড়লেন তৃণমূল বিধায়ক সোনালি গুহ। বললেন, দীর্ঘদিন একসঙ্গে থাকার একটা দাম দিল মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায় (Mamata Banerjee) ও তৃণমূল কংগ্রেস। ভালোই সম্মান পেলাম। তাঁর আক্ষেপ, আমি মমতাদির বাড়ির লোক ছিলাম। মমতাদি এটা করতে পারেন, বিশ্বাস করতে পারছি না। কান্নায় ভেঙে পড়ে বললেন, দিদি যেন এবারও মুখ্যমন্ত্রী হতে পারেন।
#TMCCandidateList #TMC #WBPolls #WestBengalElectionNews #ABPAnanda #ABPAnandaLive

snippet.title: Highlights - NorthEast United FC 1-1 ATK Mohun Bagan - Semi-Final 2 (1st Leg) | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
The #HeroISL 2020-21 semi-finals picked up more steam as NorthEast United FC & ATK Mohun Bagan played out an entertaining 1-1 draw at the GMC Stadium in Bambolim. After a slow start, David Williams put the Mariners ahead in the 34th minute. Antonio Lopez Habas' side kept it tight at the back and looked to be heading for the win. But substitute Idrissa Sylla equalised in injury time to keep the Highlanders in the tie!

Enjoy the highlights of #NEUATKMB and tell us your favourite moment in the comments below.

#Letsfootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

To subscribe, click - https://bit.ly/35AzdBp

For all the latest news & updates on Hero ISL, visit - http://bit.ly/HeroISLWeb

snippet.title: DIVINE - Satya | Prod. by Karan Kanchan | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/punyapaap

“Satya” is from DIVINE’s sophomore body of work, Punya Paap. Stirring up a 90’s-esque vibe, the track pays a thunderous ode to the city of Mumbai and the bygone era of Bollywood films. Sampling the classic track Goli Maar Bheje Mein from the Ram Gopal Varma directed film, the OG wrecking crew comprising of DIVINE and Karan Kanchan unite to wreak havoc. 

#DIVINE #PunyaPaap #Satya

snippet.title: Shabd - A Women's Day Initiative from Truecaller - #ItsNotOK
snippet.description:
It's 2021, but that age-old problem named harassment still remains at large. 

In India alone, 1 woman falls victim to stalking every 55 minutes.

Sadly, this problem isn't addressed, not on prime time nor on any other avenue.

Here is a true story of a woman who’s actions spoke for society.

#SpeakUp and take action at http://tclr.se/2MMBwN4

Take part in the survey at https://tclr.se/2MMBwN4

#ItsNotOK

Like and Subscribe, and download the mobile app for Google Play & Apple App Store: https://tclr.se/33Vwfrl

snippet.title: Paatashaala -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar|Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash|Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Song Details:
Song Name : Paatashaala
Singer : Vijay Prakash
Lyricist : Santhosh Ananddram
Music Director : Thaman S

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3062 - Full Episode - 21st December 2020
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3062: Will The Truth Be Out?
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dr Haathi tells that he has gotten his special glasses and stethoscope which will allow them to know the truth. After checking Taarak, he tells everyone that it is not Taarak who had the pizza. All this while, Goli looks worried. As the confusion around Taarak and his diet are clear, everyone decides to go home when they are stopped by Dr Haathi as he tells them that he will check everybody.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Dr Haathi tells that he has gotten his special glasses and stethoscope which will allow them to know the truth. After checking Taarak, he tells everyone that it is not Taarak who had the pizza. As the confusion around Taarak and his diet are clear, everyone decides to go home when they are stopped by Dr Haathi as he tells them that he will check everybody.

snippet.title: क्या होगा Jetha का Plan Successful?-Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3116-5th Mar, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/gokuldham-against-bhogilal-1000110240?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3116: Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and everyone from Gokuldham have made a plan to catch Bhogilal and get Jethalal's 50 lakh rupees back from him. Jethalal asks Taarak to be with Champaklal while the time of the deal as an accountant and everyone else will hide in the other room. Sundar calls Bhogilal and asks him to come to the party's house to complete the deal. Bhogilal agrees to come to the party's house.  Will Jethalal's Plan Be Successful? To know, watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Clash-A-Rama! Clash Royale 5th Anniversary Awards!
snippet.description:
#clasharama #clashroyale #birthday

The Clash Royale Arena has been turned into a glamorous award show to celebrate the 5th Anniversary!
Who will be Crowned the best Team? Red or Blue…

Thank you to all of our players for the journey so far!
See you in the Arena!

Subscribe for more! ►► http://supr.cl/SubRoyale

Enter the Arena! From the creators of Clash of Clans comes a real-time multiplayer game starring the Royales, your favorite Clash characters and much, much more.

Collect and upgrade dozens of cards featuring the Clash of Clans troops, spells and defenses you know and love, as well as the Royales: Princes, Knights, Baby Dragons and more. Knock the enemy King and Princesses from their towers to defeat your opponents and win Trophies, Crowns and glory in the Arena. Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community.

FEATURES
• Duel players from around the world in real-time in both 1v1 and 2v2 Battles
• Earn chests to unlock rewards, collect powerful new cards and upgrade existing ones
• Destroy opponent's towers and win Crowns to earn epic Crown chests
• Build and upgrade your card collection with the Clash Royale Family along with dozens of your favorite Clash troops, spells and defenses
• Construct your ultimate Battle Deck to defeat your opponents
• Progress through multiple Arenas all the way to the top
• Form a Clan to share cards and build your very own battle community
• Challenge your Clanmates and friends to a private duel, or play side-by-side in a 2v2 Battle
• Work together with your Clan to unlock Clan Chests
• Play new events every week
• Learn different battle tactics by watching the best duels on TV Royale

PLEASE NOTE! Clash Royale is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash Royale. A network connection is also required.

Support:
Are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clash-royale/ or contact us in-game by going to Settings, Help and support.

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

#ClashRoyale
SUPERCELL™ and CLASH ROYALE™ are trademarks of Supercell Oy

snippet.title: 'ভাবতেই পারছেন না কতটা ব্যবধানে হারবেন,'নন্দীগ্রামে হাই-ভোল্টেজ লড়াই প্রসঙ্গে মন্তব্য শিশির অধিকারীর
snippet.description: নন্দীগ্রাম থেকেই প্রার্থী করা হল শুভেন্দু অধিকারীকে। ফলে এবার নন্দীগ্রামে নাটকীয় দ্বৈরথের অপেক্ষা। যেখানে তৃণমূল কংগ্রেসের প্রার্থী মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। এই প্রসঙ্গে শুভেন্দুর বাবা শিশির অধিকারী বলেন, 'ওনাকে ডেকে না নিয়ে এলে এত কথা বলতে পারতেন না। নন্দীগ্রামে কোন লড়াই হবে না। নন্দীগ্রামে বিশাল ব্যবধানে হারবেন। ' আজ প্রথম দু’দফার ৬০টি আসনের মধ্যে ৫৭টি আসনের প্রার্থী তালিকা ঘোষণা করল বিজেপি।  তার মধ্যে সবথেকে উল্লেখযোগ্য, নন্দীগ্রাম আসনে মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়ের বিরুদ্ধে ভূমিপুত্র শুভেন্দু অধিকারীকে দাঁড় করাল বিজেপি। ডেবরায় লড়াই দুই প্রাক্তন আইপিএসের।  ডেবরা কেন্দ্রে বিজেপির প্রার্থী ভারতী ঘোষ।  ওই কেন্দ্রে তৃণমূলের প্রার্থী প্রাক্তন আইপিএস হুমায়ুন কবীর।  ময়না কেন্দ্রে বিজেপি প্রার্থী করেছে ভারতীয় দলের প্রাক্তন ক্রিকেটার অশোক দিন্দাকে। ওই কেন্দ্রে তৃণমূলের প্রার্থী সংগ্রাম দলুই। গণতন্ত্রের লড়াই হোক, তবে খেলা হোক, মন্তব্য ডেবরার তৃণমূল কংগ্রেস

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with 
Lotte Cultureworks, Global Gate Entertainment 

Directed by Ram Madhvani
Producers: Ronnie Screwvala, Amita Madhvani & Ram Madhvani

Executive Producer: Rhea Prabhu, Sia Bhuyan
Associate Producer: Sushmita Yadav
DOP: Manu Anand

HMU Stylist: Jay Kanojia

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1189 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Heer is forced to leave with Angel after Virat abandons her, and Harak and Preeto watch her leave helplessly. Tune in to the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode.

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Koi Hor - Dilnoor Ft. Afsana & B Praak | Sara Gurpal | Gurnazar | Shabby - New Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Pellet Drum Productions Presents "Koi Hor" which tells the story of a girl who is expecting her lover to come and confess his wrongdoings before it’s conveyed by a third person and before it's too late. “It’s a song that everybody can relate to. It talks about how we expect our loved ones to be honest with us. 

♪ Full Song Available on ♪

snippet.title: E Bull Jet നെ ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta !!
snippet.description:
E Bull Jet ന്റെ വണ്ടിയിൽ പത്തനംതിട്ടയിൽ ഒരു വാൻ ലൈഫ്, എബിനെയും ലിബിനെയും ശബരിമലയിൽ കൊണ്ട് പോയപ്പോൾ 🚐 Van Life in Pathanamthitta #techtraveleat 

Goosebery യുടെ പ്രൊഡക്ടുകൾ വാങ്ങുന്നതിന് https://www.goosebery.com/​​​​​​​​ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കുക. ‘TECHTRAVELEAT’ എന്ന കൂപ്പൺ കോഡ് ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് 20% ഡിസ്‌കൗണ്ട് കൂടുതലായി ലഭിക്കും.

Table of Content
00:00 Intro
02:55 വീട്ടിൽ നിന്നും യാത്രയാകുന്നു
03:13 ആരാധകർക്കൊപ്പം
03:46 E Bull Jet ൻ്റെ നെപ്പോളിയനെ ഞാൻ നയിച്ചപ്പോൾ
08:45 സോഡ കുടിക്കാൻ വഴിയരികിൽ വണ്ടി നിർത്തിയപ്പോൾ 
09:11 ശബരിമല റൂട്ടിലേക്ക്
11:22 ഫുൾ ടാങ്ക് ഡീസലടിച്ച് പ്രതിഷേധം
15:03 പാട്ടും പാടി എബിനും ലിബിനും
23:09 നിലയ്ക്കൽ എത്തുന്നു
32:12 പമ്പ കെഎസ്ആർടിസി സ്റ്റാൻഡിൽ എത്തിയപ്പോൾ
34:07 പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ ഇപ്പോഴത്തെ അവസ്ഥ
36:18 പമ്പയിൽ നിന്നും തിരിച്ച് വീട്ടിലേക്ക്

snippet.title: Dooriyan (Official Video) Raghav Chaitanya | Shivin Narang, Apoorva Arora | Anurag Saikia | Kunaal V
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Dooriyan sung by the youth sensation Raghav Chaitanya and the music video stars Shivin Narang and Apoorva Arora. This song has been finely composed by Anurag Saikia & written by Kunaal Vermaa. The video has been directed by Karan Anshuman who narrates a gripping story, where Shivin and Apoorva portray an estranged couple who later realise the true value of love. The story unfolds intense situations and memories of their past. 

People say you don’t know what you’ve got until it's gone. But the truth is, you knew what you had, you just never thought you’d lose it… watch till the end to see how Shivins desperate search ends.

#Shivin #Apoorva #VYRLOriginals

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/dooriyan/ML8KgFeVJQs_

♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/dooriyan-78

♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/UxhAqGaZN

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/13u4qQ9xi2DFUUZY5yRVkN?si=cA1lx3OzSzqYKHteqnPjNw

♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/dooriyan/1555654016?i=1555655056

♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XLWD8G4?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08XMJC9N8

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th March 2021
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 05 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 5th March 2021

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As Nisar’s Wife
Asma Abbas As Farhad’s Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

#HappilacPaints 
#Colors0fHappiness
#HappilacWipeout

snippet.title: मेरा नया किचन | My New Kitchen Tour | KabitasKitchen Kitchen Tour | Kabitaslifestyle |Kabitaskitchen
snippet.description:
#Kabitaskitchen #kabitavlogs #KitchenTour #MyNewKitchen

६ साल मेहनत करने के बाद आज ये मेरा सपना पूरा हुआ, बहुत बहुत धन्यवाद आपलोगो का ....आप सब ने मेरा हर कदम पर साथ दिया 🙏
मैंने ये किचन अपने वीडियो को और अच्छा बनाने के लिए बनवाया है, मेरे बनाने के तरीके में या कुकिंग में कोई अंतर नहीं आएगा .....क्यूकि आपलोगों को मेरा पुराना अंदाज़ पसंद है इसलिए मैं उस बात का पूरा ध्यान रखूंगी  :)

snippet.title: STEPHEN HAWKING की 5 भयानक भविष्यवाणियाँ जो सच होने जा रही है Stephen Hawking's Prediction
snippet.description:
Signup karo,skills dikhao paisa kamao aur account me daalo instantly! 
Link: https://skcl.sh/uSkARm
Abhi register karo (NO APP INSTALL)!
#Skillclash

Hello friends, we all know about the world famous scientists stephen hawking. We know about his research in relativity, blackholes, quantum mechanics, end of universe, big bang theory, beginning of universe, time travel etc. 
But did you know that he has also done some serious predictions about our future and the future of humanity. The following are some of the warnings stated by stephen hawking.
1 - He has warned us about earth`s highly increasing global warming rate.
2-He has warned us about humanity`s constant strive for genetically modified organisms or even genetically modified human for that matter.
3- He has made us aware about the probable problems that can occur from our constant growth in the high tech artificial intelligence area.

Well this is just a small little gist of the multiple problems that exist and may exist. 
So stay tuned in our today's video to know more!

snippet.title: सीखोगे नहीं तो जीतोगे कैसे 🔥 | MUST WATCH | @Let's LEARN  | Himanshi Singh | Josh Talks Hindi
snippet.description:
जैसे हिमांशी जी हमेशा सीखती रही और आज वो Successful हैं. 

वैसे ही हम सब भी Josh Skills के ज़रिये Spoken English सीखकर सफल हो सकते हैं - https://joshskills.app.link/ZZZR6hjfneb

0:00 Introduction

0:43 Kahani ki shuruat
1:44 Mahabharat Learnings
3:45 Struggle
4:45 Family Decision
5:16 Starting As Youtuber
6:42 Father's Incident
8:43  Motivation For Everyone
9:34 Three Learnings For Us


Himanshi Singh या Himanshi mam(@Let's LEARN ) teaching दुनिया में एक बहुत जाना पहचाना नाम है। हम सब उनकी success से तो परिचित है, पर आज उसके पीछे छिपे उनके struggle और hard work पर भी एक नज़र डालते है। 

तो women’s week के तहत आज हम देखेंगें @Let's LEARN की founder Himanshi Singh  जी की motivational story । Uttar Pradesh  के छोटे से गांव में जन्मी हिमांशी को बचपन से ही teaching का बहुत शौक था। दसवीं के बाद उन्होंने UP board  छोड़ CBSE board में admission  ले लिया जिस कारण उनके जीवन में काफी difficulties और challenges आये , पर उनकी मेहनत और will power के आगे वो कहा ही टिक पाते। स्कूल के बाद उन्होंने दो साल का diploma करा और  फिर CTET का exam clear करा. 
चाहे जितनी कठिन परिस्थितयां आयी उन्होंने strong  बनकर उनका सामना करा और इसलिए आज वो इतनी successful है और लाखो बच्चों के लिए एक inspiration है। आज वे न केवल एक teacher है अपितु कई books की author भी है। 

Himanshi Singh or Himanshi mam is a very well-known name in the teaching world of YouTube. We are all familiar with her success, but today we will also take a look at the struggle and hard work hidden behind this success story.
So, under Women’s Week, Josh Talks has brought for you all the motivational story of @Let's LEARN  founder Himanshi Singh ji. 

Born in a small village of Uttar Pradesh, Himanshi was very fond of teaching since childhood. After her tenth standard, she shifted from UP board and took admission in the CBSE board, due to which many difficulties and challenges came her way, but in front of her hard work and will power, they could not stand. After completing her high school, she did a two-year diploma and then cleared the CTET exam. She gave every test of her life with full courage and honesty. Regardless of the difficult circumstances, she faced them by being strong and that is why she is so successful today and is an inspiration to millions of children. Today she is not only a teacher but is also the author of many books.
She wants to tell the children that, it does not matter where have you come from, the only thing that matters is that how much fire is there in you to get success because every problem and difficulty of life can be overcome by being strong. Also, one should never stop learning.

You can follow Himanshi Mam on various social media handles:

Instagram: himanshisinghofficial 
Twitter: @himanshiiisingh
Let’s LEARN: https://www.youtube.com/c/LetsLEARN2016/featured


#JoshTalksHindi #WomensWeek #HimanshiSingh

Josh Talks Hindi aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Hindi motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment and social initiatives. With 7 regional languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life. 

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां. 

► जोश Talks Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 
► जोश Talks Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 
► जोश Talks Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/JoshTalksHindi​ 

-----**DISCLAIMER**----- All of the views and work outside the pretext of the video of the speaker, are his/ her own and Josh Talks, by any means, does not support them directly or indirectly and neither is it liable for it. Viewers are requested to use their own discretion while viewing the content and focus on the entirety of the story rather than finding inferences in its parts. Josh Talks by any means, does not further or amplify any specific ideology or propaganda.

जोश Talks मे हम देशभर से प्रेरणादायक कहानियां इकट्टठा करते हैं और आप तक पंहुचाते हैं. ये कहानियां उन लोगों की होती हैं जिन्होनें मुश्किल परिस्थितियों के आगे भी हिम्मत नहीं हारी और अपने जुनून से सफलता की नई मिसाल कायम की. इन कहानियों को सांझा करने का उद्देश्य है कि हम युवा पीढ़ी में जोश और उत्साह भर सकें. जोश Talks हर उस व्यक्ति के लिए हैं जो जीवन में नई दिशा ढूंढ रहें और कुछ अलग करके दिखाना चाहते हैं. तो जुड़िये जोश Talks से और जानिये आपके ही आस-पास जन्मी मोटीवेशनल कहानियां.

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 4 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Huttu Habbada Shubhashayagalu - Official Teaser | Diganth | Kavitha Gowda |  Dr.TR Chandrashekaar
snippet.description:
Here is The Official Teaser of "Huttu Habbadha Shubhashayagalu" Directed By Nagaraj Bethur, Produced By Dr. TR Chandrashekaar. 

A story of how the crime was born? Murder offences, Relationships, and investigations are all set to leave you thrilled. As the game has just begun with 'Huttu Habbada Shubhashayagalu.'
Who's the guilty victim? Let's wait for the Kannada movie coming soon while we watch the Teaser starring Diganth Manchale in a dapper look.

Producer :- Dr. TR CHANDRASHEKAAR 
Presenter :- C NANDA KISHORE
Production House : CRYSTAL PAARK CINEMAS
Director :- NAGARAJ BETHUR 

Star Cast :- Diganth, Kavita Gowda, Chethan Gandarva, Madenur Manu, Suraj, Surya, Vanisri, Rohit Rangaswamy, Shanaya Katwe, Sharanya Shetty, Sridatta, Srihari, Sujay Shastry, Ratan Ram, Amoghavarsha, Ajay Gaja

Story,Screenplay :- Prasanna V.M. 
Director of Photography :- Abhilash Kalathi 
Editor :- Srikanth Shroff 
Music :- Sridhar V. Sambram 
Background Score :- Anand Raja Vikram
Lyrics :- Yograj Bhat 
Dialogues :- Venu Hasralli 
Art :- Raghavendra Mysore, Raghu(Blacky) 

Direction Department: Rajat Suriya, Om Raghu, Nandan Telkar, Narendra Babu. 
Cameraman Team: Mohan, Annappa, Madhusudhan 
Guitars - Abhishek Bose
Sound and Foley - Babychen Paul
Trailer Mix and Master by:  Dhanasekar
Production Designer: Baalu Kumta 
Daily Incharge: Guru A Nanjanagud
Dubbing: Renu Studio (Suresh Guna)
Costumes: Dayananda Bhadravathi
VFX:-Animantra (Deepak Gowda)
Colorist :- Karthik Ananth
Choreography :- Mohan (Bajarangi)
Sound Mixed By :- Rahul Ranjan
Publicity Design :- Ashwin Ramesh PRO :- Sudhindra Venkatesh

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 1517 | 6th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 1517: Jethalal Completes His Work
-------------------------------------
Jethalal tends to forget things at home. When Bapuji lost a button of his kurta, he asks Jethalal for help. Jethalal struggles to find the thread and needle and even struggles to complete his work. Bapuji gets happy thinking Jethalal completed the work.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
